summary: Full testing of dine/celebrate fixes: font sizes, spacing, MiraTummyImaginesCard concierge ticket, pet refetch after soul answer. All 8 backend tests passing. All frontend visual/interaction tests passing.

minor.issue: DoggyAnswer Pydantic model requires 'folder' field, but the frontend doesn't send it. This is handled by a SEPARATE alias endpoint in server.py (line 14554) that uses dict instead of DoggyAnswer. The pet_soul_routes.py endpoint (line 727) is effectively shadowed. No functional issue, just confusing code.

issues: Pre-existing from iteration_143: Mojo shows only 2 Mira Imagines cards (Balanced Wholesome Bowl + Chicken-Free Complete Meal) because favorite_protein='Chicken' matches allergy. Both 'Request a Quote' buttons work correctly, now showing 'Sent to Concierge!' after click.

features_verified.dine_dim_title_15px: PASS — Daily Meals title font = 15px (computed), confirmed via getComputedStyle
features_verified.dine_dim_subtitle_13px: PASS — 'Salmon-forward, soy-free, right for Mojo' subtitle font = 13px
features_verified.dine_dim_badge_11px: PASS — 'Mojo's body needs this' badge font = 11px
features_verified.request_quote_post_dine: PASS — POST /api/service_desk/attach_or_create_ticket made with pillar='dine', pet_id='pet-mojo-7327ad56'
features_verified.request_quote_initial_message: PASS — initial_message.text contains card name 'Balanced Wholesome Bowl'
features_verified.sent_to_concierge_confirmation: PASS — 'Sent to Concierge!' shown as a div (not button) after successful POST
features_verified.sent_state_not_clickable: PASS — Element tag=DIV, no additional API request made after clicking 'Sent to Concierge!'
features_verified.loader2_spinner_in_code: PASS (code review) — {sending && <Loader2 size={11} style={{animation:'spin 1s linear infinite'}}/>} renders during POST (transient, can't screenshot)
features_verified.pet_refetch_on_soul_score_updated: PASS — soulScoreUpdated event → fetch /api/pets/pet-mojo-7327ad56 triggered. URL: https://flat-art-picker.preview.emergentagent.com/api/pets/pet-mojo-7327ad56
features_verified.soul_answer_persistence: PASS — POST /api/pet-soul/profile/{id}/answer saves to doggy_soul_answers.{question_id}, verified via GET /api/pets/{id} response
features_verified.no_reappear_answered_questions: PASS — quick-questions returns empty (0) for Mojo (100% answered), consistent with 'previously answered questions do NOT reappear'
features_verified.service_desk_backend: PASS — /api/service_desk/attach_or_create_ticket returns {ticket_id, status, is_new} correctly for pillar=dine and pillar=celebrate

action_items: MINOR: Consider making DoggyAnswer.folder optional (with default) in pet_soul_routes.py to match the server.py alias behavior. The pet_soul_routes.py POST endpoint is shadowed by server.py's alias. No user-facing impact.
critical_code_review_comments: MiraTummyImaginesCard correctly implements state machine: sending=false/requested=false (initial) → sending=true/loader shown (POST in-flight) → sending=false/requested=true ('Sent to Concierge!' div). This mirrors CelebrateContentModal exactly.

DineSoulPage soulScoreUpdated listener (lines 1185-1199): Guards with petId match check, then fetches /api/pets/{id} and calls setPetData+setCurrentPet. This ensures Mira Imagines cards update live with newly answered soul data.
Pet refetch uses Bearer token from useAuth() context — correct, no hardcoding.
server.py's /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/answer (line 14554) uses dict instead of DoggyAnswer model — allows frontend to send {question_id, answer} without folder. This is correct and working.
Font fixes correctly applied: DineSoulPage dimension cards (15/13/11px), SoulCelebrationPillars (15/11px). All verified via getComputedStyle.

test_credentials.pet_mojo: pet-mojo-7327ad56 (score=94% live / 100% after test answer, allergy=chicken)

seed_data_creation: 2 concierge tickets created for test_iter144 + test_aditya_celebrate parent_ids. 1 soul answer added (test_vet_comfort_iter144 for Mojo) — pushed Mojo to 100% in stored score.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 feature groups fully verified: (1) Dimension card fonts 15/13/11px ✓ (2) 32px spacing grid→MiraMealPick ✓ (3) Celebrate pillar fonts 15/11px ✓ (4) MiraTummyImaginesCard concierge ticket (pillar=dine) + sent state ✓ (5) Pet refetch via soulScoreUpdated event ✓. Mojo pet now has score=100% (test artifact from iter_144 test_vet_comfort_iter144 answer). Pre-existing issue: Mojo allergy=chicken matches loves=Chicken, only 2 Mira Imagines cards instead of 4.
rca_of_issues: N/A - all features working correctly. The only note is that pet_soul_routes.py has a DoggyAnswer model requiring 'folder' field, but the actual endpoint called by frontend (server.py line 14554) uses dict. This is by design - server.py aliases take precedence over pet_soul_routes.py equivalents.
